title: Warship Wednesday (on a Thursday) 30 April 2026: 695 Feet of Glory
summary: A brand new carrier full of fresh aircraft and crew with nothing to do, Glory achieved a footnote in WWII history by hosting the surrender of 139,000 troops ...
